title: AI Agent Arsenal Tool Manifest Schema
description: Tactical operator schema for validating automated agent, prompt system, and fintech utility manifest structures prior to repository deployment.

id.description: Unique system identifier in lowercase kebab-case format (e.g. 'ecommerce-cash-flow').

name.description: Pithy, high-impact functional designation of the tactical weapon or agent.

platform.description: Target architecture of the host runtime or interface system.

category.description: Operational department or deployment vector within modern commerce framework.

tag.description: Contextual routing tag for UI search matrix optimization.

status.description: Current readiness evaluation of the integration pipeline.

description.description: Operator description: must state exact inputs parsed, logic used, and functional output generated. No fluff.

color.description: Primary theme variable for the dynamic brutalist card (e.g., var(--cyan), var(--acid-green), var(--magenta)).

launchUrl.description: Direct deployment interface routing link (live endpoint, chat window, or tool page).

repoUrl.description: Destination repo hosting core system instructions, YAML stencils, or static logic files.

chatgpt.description: Operational connectivity status mapping to OpenAI models.

notion.description: Active CRM webhook syncing telemetry data straight to Notion pipeline databases.

supabase.description: Database state showing tokenization protection parameters active on Edge Functions.

githubUsername.description: Validator field to ensure clean, automated pull request routing on GitHub.
